name.title: Name your workspace
name.description: Workspaces keep your agents organized, one for personal, one for work, etc.

provider.title: Connect your AI
provider.description: Houston uses <emph>your own</emph> subscription. We never see your credentials.

migrationReconnect.title: Welcome back
migrationReconnect.body: Your assistants and everything you've worked on are right here. Just reconnect your AI to pick up where you left off.
migrationReconnect.dismissError: We couldn't save that. Please try again.

errors.setupFailed: We couldn't finish setting up your workspace. Please try again.
errors.noProviderModel: Connect an AI provider before creating your assistant.

welcome.title: Welcome to Houston
welcome.tagline: Houston is where you build agents that work with the same apps you already use.
welcome.stepsTitle: A quick setup to get your agent working:

steps.brain: Connect an AI provider so it can think
steps.email: Send your first real email with it
steps.try: Try a real mission with your assistant
steps.skill: Save it as a reusable Skill
steps.routine: Schedule it as a recurring Routine

defaults.focus: Help me stay organized, prepare my day, draft messages, protect focus time, and keep track of follow-ups.
defaults.approvalRule: Ask before sending messages, creating calendar events, or changing anything in connected apps.
defaults.firstWorkflow: Set up my first useful daily workflow

intro.title: Let's set up your account
intro.body: A few quick steps and your agent is ready to work for you.

connect.title: Connect your AI
connect.body: Choose the AI you already pay for and sign in. You bring your own subscription, so Houston never sees your password or your bill.

meet.title: Create your first agent
meet.body: Give your agent a name and a color. You can change them anytime.

email.title: See your agent in action
email.body: Your agent will send a real email to you, so you can watch it work.
email.skipHint: Your agent finished but didn't confirm. You can skip and start using Houston.

aiConnected.title: Your AI is connected!
aiConnected.body: Your agent can think now. You're one step closer.

connectEmail.title: Give your agent access to your email
connectEmail.body: Pick your email so your agent can send on your behalf. You connect it once, securely.
connectEmail.skipHint: Can't connect right now? You can do this anytime from Integrations.

agentCreated.title: Agent created!
agentCreated.body: Meet your new agent. Two quick steps and it's working for you.

emailConnected.title: Email connected!
emailConnected.body: That's how easy connecting an app is, and your agent can reach 1000+ this way.

emailSent.title: Email sent!
emailSent.body: Go check your inbox, your agent just sent you a real email.

finished.title: You're all set!
finished.body: Your agent is ready. What would you like to do next?
finished.tourBody: A quick walkthrough of the basics.
finished.connectMoreBody: Give your agent access to more of your tools.
finished.inviteTeamBody: See who's working on every mission. Create a team and share your agents.

onboardingIntro.title: Now let's put it to work
onboardingIntro.body: Three quick steps to see your agent do something real.

try.title: Try a real mission

intro.title: Work with your first agent
intro.body: In Houston, your agents connect to your real tools to actually do work for you.

try.doneTitle: You did it. First mission complete.

skill.title: Plan my next working day
skill.description: Read your calendar and inbox in parallel, cross-reference them for things you'd miss, and post a structured plan with what's urgent, your agenda and what to reply.

skill.title: Save this as a Skill

intro.title: Save it as a Skill
intro.body: If you want to run this same flow again later, save it as a Skill. Your assistant can reuse it with one click, or whenever you ask.

skill.savedDescription: Plan the next working day by cross-referencing inbox and calendar, with a draft reply for the top email worth answering.
skill.savedMessage: Saved as a Skill called **{{slug}}**. You can run it anytime, with one click or by asking me.

done.title: Saved as a Skill
done.subtitle: Now you can run this anytime, with one click or by asking.

intro.title: Make it a Routine
intro.body: If you want this to run automatically on a schedule, save it as a Routine. Your assistant runs it in the background and shows you the result.

done.title: Your Routine is ready
done.subtitle: Houston will run this automatically on the schedule you picked.
done.manualHint: You can also create routines yourself from the Routines tab, or just ask any agent.

summary.title: Your assistant is ready
summary.body: Here is everything you just set up. You can change any of it later from the Skills or Routines tab, or just ask your assistant.
